howItWorks.intro: This half marathon pace calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Individual results vary based on metabolism, genetics, and activity level. Consult your doctor before starting any program.

faq.question: What is a good half marathon time?
faq.answer: Average is about 2:00-2:15. Sub-1:45 is strong, sub-1:30 is competitive, sub-1:15 is elite.

faq.question: Half marathon vs marathon prediction?
faq.answer: Double your half time and add 10-20 minutes for a marathon estimate. The half is a good predictor of marathon potential.

faq.question: How long to train?
faq.answer: 12-16 weeks for a beginner who can already run 3-4 miles. Includes building up to a 10-12 mile long run.

faq.question: What pace should long runs be?
faq.answer: 30-90 seconds per mile slower than goal race pace. Long runs build endurance — speed comes from tempo and interval sessions.

faq.question: Is the Half Marathon Pace Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Half Marathon Pace Calculator?
sections.body: The Half Marathon Pace Calculator is a free online tool designed for athletes and fitness enthusiasts who need quick, accurate calculations in the fitness and training space. By entering your goal time, goal time, you get instant results including required pace, 5k split, 10k split. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting required pace right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In fitness and training, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by athletes and fitness enthusiasts worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to optimize your training with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your goal time and need to find the right required pace. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
